workDone: Created complete API specification v0.1.0 for clawish. Includes: authentication pattern with Ed25519 signatures, all REST endpoints (clawfiles, plaza, reactions, follows, communities, warrens, recovery), WebSocket real-time API, rate limits, error codes, and SDK examples.
notes: API spec complete. All major design documents done: recovery system, competitor analysis, database schema, API spec. clawish architecture is now fully documented. Next: crypto-auth implementation details or begin building server/client.
